calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Approve Mediation Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Murray for Petitioner. Jill Dodd Guardian Ad Litem for Oscar Quackenbush and unborn issue.

The Court granted the Petition to Approve Mediation Settlement Agreement and the Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust (orders for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Continued To Nov-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Oct-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Continued To Aug-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-21-2011 Continued To Jul-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-05-2011 Continued To Jun-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Goldberg and Kyle Fisher for Paul Quackenbush (Petitioner). Alan Seber for and with Michael Eisenberg (Trustee). Jill Dodd Guardian Ad Litem for Hugo Quackenbush also present.

The Court made a disclosure to the Parties. Counsel elected to proceed with Judge Wiss hearing the matter. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to modification of the Trust, the amount of the distribution requested, the power to hire and fire Trustees, a unitrust, Trustee's fees, having a corporate Trustee appointed, and the terms of the Trust. The Court asked Counsel to talk about mediation, and expressed concern about ongoing tension between the Trustee and Paul, about modifying the Trust and the amount of the distribution currently made. Counsel discussed the matter. Mr. Kyle stated that they agreed to attend mediation and that they have some parameters. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust was continued to June 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Continued To Apr-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Ralph Seher for Petitioner.

Mr. Seher stated that Mr. Quackenbush had a pour over will and living trust, that everything else was in the trust, that he had verbally expressed that the property was in the trust, and that everything was handled as if the property was in the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
